task_description: list all executable files under the current directory
code:
echo "Checking if there are any directories with executable files..."
find . -maxdepth 1 -type d | while read dir; do
    echo "Checking directory: $dir"
    find "$dir" -maxdepth 1 -type f -executable
done

trace.stdout:
Checking if there are any directories with executable files...
Checking directory: .
Checking directory: ./tasks
